issue_initial: 401 Unauthorized errors blocking dashboard quick-info widgets
issue_discovered: Sessions lost when navigating between tabs (session dropout)

root_causes.primary: Session cookie marked secure: true for HTTP requests
root_causes.detail: Cookie configuration was using NODE_ENV=production as fallback, causing secure: true for HTTP which browsers reject

root_causes.primary: Cookie domain mismatch causing session loss on navigation
root_causes.detail: Cookie was restricted to domain: 'redsquatch.com', but frontend on Docker IP (10.0.1.12) cannot access domain-restricted cookies. Browser rejects cross-origin cookies.
root_causes.symptoms: Sessions persist initially, then lost on tab navigation/reload

fixes_applied.title: Initial cookie configuration fix
changes: Fixed HTTPS detection to not default to production mode

fixes_applied.title: Corrected HTTPS detection logic
changes: Simplified to only trust actual protocol indicators
Removed fallback to NODE_ENV for HTTPS detection

fixes_applied.title: Critical fix: Detect non-production origins
changes: For non-production: domain: undefined (session-only, no cross-origin issues)
For production: domain: redsquatch.com (works across subdomains)

session_persistence_5_requests.action: Login once, then make 5 consecutive requests with same cookie
session_persistence_5_requests.status: ✓ PASS - Sessions now persist across requests

protected_endpoints.status: ✓ PASS - No 401 errors on protected endpoints

cookie_configuration.result: secure: false, sameSite: lax, domain: undefined

key_improvements: Initial 401 errors on dashboard load - FIXED
Session loss on navigation between tabs - FIXED
Cookie configuration dynamically adjusted for environment
Production HTTPS + dev Docker IP both supported
